name: linear-orchestration
description: Linear-backed task orchestration: grill a task to a spec, set up a long-lived per-repo Linear project with the epic as a milestone and chunks as issues, then dispatch self-managing worker subagents that build their chunk, run their own code-standards + review loop (spawning a checker and a tier-by-complexity reviewer), and post their own Linear updates (attempt-then-relay; the orchestrator is writer of last resort). Everything addressed by explicit ID for concurrent multi-project safety. Engages via skill-discovery on matching non-trivial tasks.
